Name: Blowing
Description: Blowing leaves, lawn clippings, or dirt/debris to desired location.

Name: Debris Removal/Bagging
Description: Picking up unwanted debris around your yard (sticks, trash, ect.).

Name: Felling (Chainsaw)
Description: Felling small trees/shrubs with a chainsaw.

Name: Grass/Ground Cover Removal
Description: Removing any unwanted grass, or in the case of making a new bed or replacing with sod removing the grass completely within a the selected area.

Name: Landscaping Blocks (stone)
Description: 10" stone landscaping blocks to divide areas cleanly

Name: Leaf Removal
Description: Blowing/raking any leaves on your property for easy bagging and/or removal.

Name: Mulching/Soil Placement
Description: Mulching any beds that you desire.

Name: Planting/Transplanting
Description: Moving any plants that you want, without harming them.

Name: Spraying
Description: Spraying weeds in cracks or hard-to-reach places (environmentally friendly, vinegar-based solution).

Name: Stump Removal
Description: Removing any small stumps that you want gone.

Name: Vine Removal
Description: Removing any vines off of bushes, hedges, trees, and/or fences.

Name: Weed Whacking/Edging
Description: Cutting back weeds/unwanted growth or edging lawn with string trimmer.

Name: Weeding
Description: Weeding any flower beds or places in your yard that you see fit.

Name: Weeding Maintenance
Description: Weeding and removing small debris from garden beds.
